subject: [INT] Add docker image for testkube custom executor
commit_message:
[INT] Add docker image for testkube custom executor

Adding a new docker image that will be used as a
base for a custom executor in testkube. Dockerfile
was simplified a bit to match capabilities of docker
v20.

Issue-ID: INT-2320
Change-Id: I61b236aa6d22e7340ea4ce0dadc5e9cff2346bf2
Signed-off-by: Marek Szwałkiewicz <marek.szwalkiewicz@external.t-mobile.pl>

The Commit title must follow this pattern "[WHAT] A title"

WHAT can be a component name (AAI for example), DOC for documentation, COMMON for common, ...

The title must start with a capital letter (A in the example) and a space must be set between the end of the topic and the actual title: "] A title" ( https://jenkins.onap.org/job/integration-xtesting-master-commit-lint/288/ )

It seems that you don"t have a commit body.
